query:
INSERT INTO host_listings (
  hostName, email, wechatOrPhone, languages, bio,
  title, district, fullAddress, cuisineStyle, menuDescription,
  pricePerPerson, maxGuests, mealDurationMinutes,
  profilePhotoUrl, foodPhotoUrls,
  status, discountPercentage
) VALUES (
  'Chuan 川',
  'host.chuan@example.com',
  'WeChat: chuan_shanghai',
  '["Mandarin", "English"]',
  'Chuan\'s culinary journey began in childhood when she couldn\'t find delicious, lightly-oiled stir-fried eggplant in restaurants, so she decided to cook herself. Her passion for home cooking was ignited from that moment. Her philosophy of "eating well" means nutritious, balanced meals with clean flavors and authentic taste. Her dishes blend ingredients and flavors from Guangxi, Guangdong, and Southeast Asia.',
  'Guangxi-Guangdong-Southeast Asian Fusion Home Dining',
  'Xuhui',
  'Panyu Road 801, Xuhui District (near Jiaotong University Metro)',
  'Guangxi-Guangdong-Southeast Asian Fusion',
  'Signature dishes include Tomato Minced Meat Noodles (番茄肉末拌粉), Radish Beef Brisket Soup (萝卜清汤牛腩), and Sizzling Chicken (啫啫鸡). Menu adjusts seasonally with fresh ingredients. Focus on nutritious home-style cooking with balanced flavors.',
  230,
  2,
  120,
  'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/yqAeFzoepWJBZJHc.jpg',
  '["https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/vkfJYmdVVbfnfhhQ.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/QZcEqDKnxwbOrnzM.jpg", "https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663228681359/QcfUYovqTanhGHgC.JPG"]',
  'approved',
  0
);
